---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new pipeline feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A concise one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? Which use-case does it address?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you would like the feature to work.
Include any API sketches, configuration changes, or example CLI usage.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you considered and why they were ruled out.

## Additional context
Links, references, sample data, or related issues.
